expected_investigation_steps.step: Flag Office spawning PowerShell with an encoded command line.
expected_investigation_steps.rationale: Unusual parent-child relationship plus obfuscation indicates malicious execution.

expected_investigation_steps.step: Inspect the outbound connection destination for C2 characteristics.
expected_investigation_steps.rationale: Confirms whether the scripted process is communicating externally.

expected_containment_actions.action: Isolate host WKSTN-042 from the network.
expected_containment_actions.rationale: Stops further C2 or lateral movement.

expected_containment_actions.action: Quarantine the Office document that launched PowerShell.
